Enabled.Name: Enable Action Tracker
Enabled.Hint: Globally enable or disable the Action, Bonus Action, and Reaction trackers on character and NPC sheets.

PlayerPosition.Name: Player Sheet Tracker Position
PlayerPosition.Hint: Choose where the Action, Bonus Action, and Reaction trackers are displayed on player character sheets.

NPCPosition.Name: NPC Sheet Tracker Position
NPCPosition.Hint: Choose where the Action, Bonus Action, and Reaction trackers are displayed on NPC sheets.
